description: Modern technology, heated comfort features, and turbo efficiency make this Trax LT a smart compact SUV choice.  This 2025 Chevrolet Trax LT FWD delivers modern technology, efficient turbocharged performance, and everyday comfort in a sleek compact SUV. Finished in Crimson Metallic and powered by a responsive 1.2L turbocharged engine paired with a 6-speed automatic transmission, it offers smooth acceleration and excellent fuel efficiency for commuting and daily driving.  Inside, the Trax LT features heated front seats, a heated steering wheel, heated power-adjustable outside mirrors, Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, Bluetooth connectivity, and keyless open on the front doors creating a comfortable, connected cabin designed for convenience. The LT Convenience Package and Preferred Equipment Group enhance everyday usability with thoughtful touches throughout.  This Trax has a clean CARFAX vehicle history report, reinforcing its value as a well-maintained, newer SUV. With fuel economy rated at 28 city / 32 highway MPG, its a smart choice for drivers seeking efficiency, comfort, and modern features in an easy-to-own package.  CarBravo Certified. Second-hand vehicles. First-class service. CarBravo is a convenient way to shop for quality used vehicles, offering access to one of the nation's largest inventories with flexible shopping and delivery options. Putting the power in your hands for a better used vehicle buying experience. CarBravo Certified vehicles are less than 10 model years old and have fewer than 85,000 miles at the time of sale, and include a 12-month/12,000-mile limited bumper-to-bumper warranty (whichever comes first) for added peace of mind. If the vehicle has remaining bumper-to-bumper coverage under the Original New Vehicle Limited Warranty, the CarBravo limited warranty begins once the original coverage expires; if the original warranty has already expired due to time or mileage, CarBravo coverage becomes effective on the contract date of sale. description: This 2025 Porsche Macan AWD delivers a striking combination of athletic performance, refined luxury, and cutting-edge technology, offered as a one-owner vehicle with a clean CARFAX and no accidents reported. Finished in Black, this Macan commands attention with a sleek, confident presence, further enhanced by 20-inch Macan S wheels in High Gloss Black, side blades in exterior color, and sport tailpipes in black for a bold, performance-inspired look.Inside, the cabin reflects the Porsche commitment to craftsmanship and driver-focused design. 14-Way Power Seats with Memory Package provide exceptional comfort and personalization, while front ventilated seats and rear heated seats ensure all-season comfort for every occupant. Premium touches such as Porsche crests embossed on the front headrests and the meticulously finished interior create an atmosphere that feels both sporty and luxurious.Technology and convenience are seamlessly integrated throughout the cabin. Apple CarPlay and a built-in navigation system keep you connected and confidently on course, while the immersive BOSE Surround Sound System delivers rich, high-fidelity audio for every drive. The expansive Panoramic Roof System fills the interior with natural light, enhancing the open, airy feel of the cabin. Everyday usability is elevated with a power liftgate, rain-sensing wipers, and a garage door transmitter (HomeLink) for added convenience.Advanced safety and driver assistance features include Lane Change Assist (LCA), ParkAssist (front and rear), and Surround View, making highway driving and parking situations effortless. LED Headlights with Porsche Dynamic Light System Plus (PDLS+) provide outstanding illumination and a distinctive lighting signature that enhances both visibility and style.Under the hood, the 2.0L turbocharged inline-4 engine paired with Porsche lightning-fast 7-speed Porsche Doppelkupplung (PDK) transmission delivers smooth, responsive acceleration and engaging performance. All-wheel drive ensures confident traction and control in all driving conditions, while the Sport Chrono Package sharpens throttle response and driving dynamics for a more spirited experience.Finished with premium details such as the Exclusive Design fuel cap and Premium Package Plus, this 2025 Porsche Macan AWD in Black is an exceptional opportunity to own a nearly new, highly optioned luxury SUV that embodies Porsche performance, comfort, and unmistakable style.CPO Limited Warranty Coverage: 2 Years / Unlimited Miles Warranty after the expiration of the new vehicle limited warranty or from the date of sale if the new vehicle limited warranty has expired. Multipoint Inspection: A Porsche Approved (CPO) Vehicle has been inspected in compliance with our 111-point checklist to ensure they meet the minimum mechanical and cosmetic standards and the vehicle meets the Porsche preparation standards. All work has been performed by Porsche trained technicians and only Genuine Porsche parts have been used. 24-Hour Roadside Assistance: A Porsche Approved (CPO) Vehicle comes with exclusive roadside assistance that offers added security when traveling. With the purchase or lease of each Porsche Approved (CPO) Vehicle, the owner will receive the advantages of the Porsche 24-Hour Roadside Assistance program for the duration of the Porsche Limited Warranty.Plus government fees and taxes, any finance charges, $85 dealer document processing charge, any electronic filing charge and any emission testing charge.[!@@Additional Info@@!]4 Cylinder Engine,4-Wheel Disc Brakes,7-Speed A/T,A/C,ABS,Adaptive Cruise Control,Adjustable Steering Wheel,All Wheel Drive,Aluminum Wheels,AM/FM Stereo,Apple CarPlay,Auto-Dimming Rearview Mirror,Automatic Headlights,Auxiliary Audio Input,Back-Up Camera,Bluetooth,Brake Actuated Limited Slip Differential,Brake Assist,Bucket Seats,Child Safety Locks,Climate Control,Cloth Seats,Cruise Control,Daytime Running Lights,Driver Air Bag,Driver Illuminated Vanity Mirror,Driver Vanity Mirror,Engine Immobilizer,Floor Mats,Front Head Air Bag,Front Side Air Bag,Gasoline Fuel,Headlights-Auto-Leveling,Heated Mirrors,Heated Seats,Integrated Turn Signal Mirrors,Intermittent Wipers,Keyless Entry,Keyless Start,Leather Seats,Leather Steering Wheel,Mirror Memory,MP3 Player,Multi-Zone A/C,Navigation System,Pass-Through Rear Seat,Passenger Air Bag,Passenger Illuminated Visor Mirror,Passenger Vanity Mirror,Power Door Locks,Power Driver Seat,Power Liftgate,Power Mirror(s),Power Passenger Seat,Power Steering,Power Windows,Privacy Glass,Rain Sensing Wipers,Rear A/C,Rear Defrost,Rear Head Air Bag,Rear Parking Aid,Rear Side Air Bag,Rear Spoiler,Remote Trunk Release,Satellite Radio,Seat Memory,Security System,Smart Device Integration,Stability Control,Steering Wheel Audio Controls,Telematics,Tire Pressure Monitor,Tires - Front Performance,Tires - Rear Performance,Traction Control,Transmission w/Dual Shift Mode,Trip Computer,Turbo/Supercharged,Universal Garage Door Opener,Variable Speed Intermittent Wipers,WiFi Hotspot

description: LOCAL TRADE, The 2025 Kia K4 GT-Line Turbo is a compelling new entry in the compact sedan segment, blending spirited performance, contemporary style, and an upscale technology suiteall at a value-oriented price point. Positioned near the top of the K4 lineup, the GT-Line Turbo differentiates itself with a 1.6-liter turbocharged inline-4 engine producing 190 horsepower and 195 lb-ft of torque, paired to an 8-speed automatic transmission with paddle shifters for a more engaging drive. This powertrain delivers brisk accelerationabout 7.17.3 seconds to 60 mph in independent testingand a broad usable torque curve that makes everyday driving feel responsive and lively. Car and Driver+1 Visually, the K4 GT-Line Turbo stands out with unique GT-Line fasciae, gloss-black accents, LED cube projection headlights and 18-inch alloy wheels that give it a sportier and more assertive stance compared with lower trims. Inside, the design is modern and tech-forward, featuring a sweeping digital cockpit with integrated displays, intuitive infotainment, and available ambient lighting that elevate the cabin atmosphere. The interior materials include Onyx/Off-White synthetic leather as standard in the Turbo trim, with an available Red Interior Package for a more expressive look. Kia Media+1 Comfort and convenience are emphasized with standard heated front seats, while options like ventilated seats, drivers seat memory, and advanced driver-assist packages bring luxury-car features into this compact sedan. Tech amenities such as wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, a premium Harman-Kardon audio system, and available surround view camera and blind-spot view monitors lend a premium feel and practical utility. +1 Underneath, the GT-Line Turbo benefits from a multi-link rear suspension, sport-tuned steering, and a well-balanced chassis that combines comfort with confidence through corners. Fuel economy remains respectable for a turbocharged gasoline engine, with EPA estimates around 29 mpg combined, making it suitable for both daily commuting and longer drives. J.D. Power Overall, the 2025 K4 GT-Line Turbo delivers a rounded package that melds sporty performance, contemporary style, premium tech, and everyday practicality in a segment where such a combination is rare. description: Discover the exceptional 2025 Buick Encore GX Avenir, a remarkable compact SUV that seamlessly blends style, technology, and performance. This compact SUV is designed to provide a smooth, responsive, and confident ride, thanks to its Ride & Handling Suspension and precise, speed-sensing steering.  Step inside the Encore GX Avenir and experience the epitome of modern luxury. The 8-way power driver's seat with 2-way power lumbar support allows you to find your perfect driving position, while the memory seat function remembers your preferred settings.  Connectivity is at the forefront, with wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto integration, allowing you to seamlessly access your favorite apps and content. The Bose premium 7-speaker audio system provides an immersive listening experience, while the wireless charging pad keeps your devices powered up on the go.  Safety is a top priority in the Encore GX Avenir, with a suite of advanced driver-assistance technologies. Enjoy the peace of mind of Adaptive Cruise Control, Rear Park Assist, and the HD Surround Vision system, which provides a comprehensive view of your surroundings. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. description: Discover the perfect balance of power, capability, and modern convenience in the 2023 Toyota Tacoma SR5 V6. This impressive midsize truck is ready to take on any adventure, whether you're conquering the off-road trails or navigating the city streets.  - 4WD - Toyota Safety Sense - Apple CarPlay - Android Auto - SR5 Package - Front Door Smart Key System w/Push Button Start - Daytime Running Lamps - Front Fog & Driving Lamp - Black Headlamp Bezel - Charcoal Grille w/Chrome Surround - Color-Keyed Overfenders - Power Sliding Rear Window w/Privacy Glass  Beneath the rugged exterior lies a 3.5L V6 engine that delivers an impressive 278 horsepower, mated to a smooth-shifting 6-speed automatic transmission. With 4WD capabilities and an EPA-estimated 22 MPG on the highway, this Tacoma is ready to tackle any terrain while providing impressive fuel efficiency.  The interior of this Tacoma SR5 V6 is designed with your comfort and convenience in mind. Enjoy features like dual-zone automatic climate control, a power driver's seat, and a premium audio system with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto integration. The split-folding rear seat and ample cargo space make it easy to adapt to your ever-changing needs, whether you're hauling gear for your next outdoor adventure or transporting oversized items.  Safety is also a top priority, with Toyota Safety Sense technologies like Pre-Collision System with Pedestrian Detection, Lane Departure Alert, and Automatic High Beams. You can drive with confidence, knowing that advanced safety features are working to protect you and your passengers. description: This 2023 Toyota Highlander XLE is a spacious and refined three-row SUV finished in Magnetic Gray Metallic with a Black SofTex-trimmed interior, offering the perfect combination of comfort, performance, and everyday versatility. With 44,320 miles on the odometer, this CARFAX 1-Owner rental vehicle has a strong maintenance record, including recent oil and filter service and tire rotation in January 2026. CARFAX reports no accidents or damage, no structural damage, no airbag deployment, and no open recalls.  Under the hood, this Highlander XLE is powered by a 2.4L I4 PDI Turbocharged DOHC 16V engine producing 265 horsepower, paired with an 8-speed automatic transmission and Front-Wheel Drive. Four-wheel independent suspension, traction control, Electronic Stability Control, and 4-wheel disc brakes help deliver a smooth, confident ride whether you are commuting or traveling with the family.  Inside, the Highlander XLE offers comfort for up to eight passengers with SofTex seat trim, heated front seats, a power driver's seat, a power passenger's seat, and a reclining split-bench third row. The cabin is equipped with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, Toyota Audio Multimedia with SiriusXM capability, a backup camera, and the Safety Connect emergency communication system. Dual-zone automatic climate control with rear air conditioning ensures cabin comfort. Additional highlights include a power moonroof, power liftgate, 18-inch machined-finish alloy wheels, roof rails, heated power mirrors with turn signal indicators, a leather-wrapped steering wheel, HomeLink garage door transmitter, and steering wheel-mounted controls for added convenience.  The CARFAX Vehicle History Report for this vehicle was provided by Toyota of Portland, located at 55 NE Broadway St, Portland, OR 97232. They can be reached at 855-685-1820 for more information. description: Discover the power and style of the 2024 Mazda CX-90 3.3 Turbo Preferred Plus. This impressive SUV combines advanced performance, cutting-edge technology, and refined luxury, making it the perfect choice for those seeking an exceptional driving experience.  Boasting a potent I6 Turbo engine paired with an 8-Speed Automatic transmission and All-Wheel Drive, the CX-90 delivers exceptional power and control on the road. With an impressive 24 city / 28 highway MPG, this SUV offers exceptional efficiency without sacrificing performance.  - Heads-Up Display - Power Liftgate - Leather Seat Trim - Heated Front Bucket Seats - Mazda Connected Services - Pandora Internet Radio Integration  The CX-90's sleek and sophisticated exterior is complemented by a spacious and well-appointed interior, featuring premium materials and advanced technology. From the intuitive infotainment system with voice commands to the convenient power liftgate, every detail has been thoughtfully designed to enhance your driving experience.  Step inside and discover the comfort and convenience of the CX-90's cabin. Sink into the plush, heated front seats and enjoy the seamless integration of your smartphone with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. The Heads-Up Display keeps essential information right in your line of sight, while the Mazda Connected Services provide a suite of advanced connectivity features.  Safety is also a top priority in the CX-90, with a comprehensive suite of advanced driver assistance technologies, including Automatic Emergency Notification, Blind Spot Monitoring, and Rear Cross-Traffic Alert. You can drive with confidence, knowing that you and your passengers are well-protected. Meticulously maintained and backed by Toyota's renowned quality, this Certified Pre-Owned gem is ready to take you on unforgettable adventures.  - NH State Inspected - Factory Certified Pre-Owned Vehicle - TRD SPORT PREMIUM PACKAGE - LONG BED W/INVERTER - SPRAY-ON BED LINER (TMS) - ALL WEATHER FLOOR LINERS (TMS) - DOOR EDGE GUARD (TMS) - DOOR PANEL SCUFF PROTECTOR (TMS) - GUNMETAL TAILGATE INSERT (TMS) - WHEEL LOCKS (TMS) - FRONT & REAR MUD GUARDS - Towing Technology Package - TRD Sport Premium Package  Boasting a powerful 2.4L 4-cylinder engine paired with an 8-speed automatic transmission and 4-wheel drive, this Tacoma TRD Sport delivers exceptional performance and capability. With an impressive 19 MPG in the city and 23 MPG on the highway, it strikes the perfect balance between power and efficiency. description: Elevate your driving experience with this exceptional 2025 Hyundai Elantra SE. Boasting a sleek white exterior and a well-appointed interior, this compact sedan is the perfect blend of style, technology, and performance.  Highlighted features include:  Blind Spot Monitor  Lane Keeping Assistance  Apple CarPlay / Android Auto  Cross Traffic Alert  Backup Camera  Bluetooth  Cruise Control  Power Windows and Locks  Steering Wheel Radio Controls  Aluminum Wheels  Beyond the impressive list of standard features, this Elantra SE also comes equipped with a host of premium upgrades, including a Reversible Cargo Tray, Rear Bumper Applique, and Roadside Assistance Kit. The Option Group 01 package further enhances the driving experience with added convenience and safety.  Under the hood, the Elantra SE is powered by a fuel-efficient I4 engine paired with a CVT transmission, delivering an impressive 32 city / 41 highway MPG. This combination of efficiency and performance ensures you'll enjoy the daily commute or weekend getaway with confidence and ease.  Safety is a top priority, and the Elantra SE delivers with a comprehensive suite of advanced driver-assistance technologies. From Dual Front Impact Airbags to Electronic Stability Control and Rear Camera, you can drive with peace of mind, knowing you and your passengers are well-protected.  The interior of this Elantra SE is equally impressive, featuring premium cloth seating, a user-friendly infotainment system with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, and thoughtful storage solutions throughout. The Tilt and Telescoping Steering Wheel and Steering Wheel-Mounted Audio Controls ensure a personalized and comfortable driving experience.  With its exceptional fuel efficiency, advanced safety features, and impressive list of amenities, this 2025 Hyundai Elantra SE is the perfect choice for the discerning driver. description: This 2023 Honda Civic Sedan Touring, has a Sonic Gray Pearl exterior and an Black interior color. 48,500 miles.  Stock Number PH325002. You can connect with us by calling (407) 628-4343.     No Accidents!  One Owner!     OTHER NOTABLE FEATURES AND OPTIONS YOU SHOULD KNOW ABOUT:    Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring  SONIC GRAY PEARL, BLACK, LEATHER SEAT TRIM   At Holler Hyundai, all of our vehicles are clearly marked with our haggle-free best price and our sales associates are commission-free. When your arms are full of cargo, the last thing you want to do is set it all down just to open the liftgate, then pick it all back up to load it in. By remotely opening and closing, power liftgate lets you skip straight to the loading. It also eliminates the awkward stretch to reach up for the liftgate to close it. Load and go with power open and close liftgate. Keyfob engine start control - Get an early start.  Remotely start your vehicle's engine from the key fob, ensuring your ride is ready to go when you get in. Now you can stay comfortable inside while your vehicle gets comfortable outside, thanks to Keyfob engine start control.Safety and Security Blind spot warning - Protect your blind side. You checked the mirror, looked over your shoulder and still nearly collided with the car next to you. Blind spot warning alerts you to the presence of a vehicle to your sides or rear so you know if you're about to make an unsafe lane change.  Replace fear and uncertainty with confidence and safety with blind spot warning.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. Voice activated integrated navigation system - A to B made easy! Whether it's an errand or a road trip, the voice activated integrated navigation system will guide you to your destination.  No more bulky, impossible-to-fold maps, and no more stopping to ask for directions. Just tell it where you want to go, and the voice activated integrated navigation system shows you the right way. description: Clean CARFAX. AWD, Navigation System/GPS/NAV, Panoramic Roof, Blind Spot Monitors, Active Blind Spot Assist, Active Brake Assist w/Cross-Traffic Function, Active Distance Assist DISTRONIC®, Active Emergency Stop Assist, Active Lane Change Assist, Active Multicontour Front Seats w/Massage Feature, Active Speed Limit Assist, Active Steering Assist, Active Stop & Go Assist, Driver Assistance Package Plus, Evasive Steering Assist, Heated 2nd Row Seats, Heated Armrest, Heated Rear Armrests, Heated Steering Wheel, MBUX Augmented Video for Navigation, PRE-SAFE® PLUS Rear-End Collision Protection, Rapid Heating Front Seats, Route-Based Speed Adaptation, Soft-Close Doors, Traffic Sign Assist, Warmth & Comfort Package, Wheels: 21" Triple 5-Spoke.  1. Enhanced Safety & Active Driving Support  The Driver Assistance Package (often called Driver Assistance Package Plus on Mercedes) includes a broad suite of advanced driver aid technologies that help keep you safer and more confident on the road:   Active Distance Assist DISTRONIC  adaptive cruise control that maintains a set following distance, even in stop-and-go traffic.  Active Stop & Go Assist  helps relieve stress in heavy traffic by automatically managing speed and braking.  Active Steering Assist & Active Lane Change Assist  helps keep the GLS centered in its lane and assists during lane changes when safe.  Active Blind Spot Assist & Traffic Sign Assist  alerts and helps correct in blind-spot situations and recognizes posted speed limits.  Evasive Steering Assist & Active Emergency Stop Assist  supports emergency avoidance and can bring the vehicle to a stop if the driver becomes incapacitated.  PRE-SAFE PLUS rear collision protection  enhances occupant protection if a rear impact is imminent.  Advantage: This system helps reduce driver workload, improve situational awareness, and make highway travel and rush-hour commuting safer and less stressful.   2. Elevated Comfort & Passenger Warmth (Warmth & Comfort Package)  The Warmth & Comfort Package adds features that make the GLS450s cabin more pleasant in cold weather and for long drives:   Rapid Heating Front Seats  quickly warms up the driver and front passenger during cold weather.  Heated Second-Row Seats  adds warmth for rear occupants, making all three rows comfortable in winter.  Heated Armrests (Front & Rear)  added comfort for elbows and hands, reducing chill during cold months.  Advantage: These added comfort touches create a cozier cabin environment on chilly days and enhance the experience for all occupants.   3. Stress-Reducing Convenience on the Road  Combined with the standard strong GLS450 foundations, these packages significantly improve everyday usability:   Easier long-distance highway driving  adaptive cruise and lane assist reduce fatigue on long trips.  Improved urban and traffic driving confidence  automatic braking, sign recognition, and evasive steering help handle complex scenarios.  Enhanced passenger comfort in all weather with heated seating and warmed armrests.  These features work together to make the GLS450 not just a luxury SUV, but a more relaxed and engaging vehicle to live with every day.   4. Suitability for Family or Executive Use  With these packages, the GLS450 becomes even more appealing for drivers who want both premium comfort and advanced safety tech:  Family-friendly comfort  everyone stays warm and comfortable on cold weather commutes or road trips.  Executive appeal for highway travel  advanced driver aids make freeway cruising feel more refined and less taxing.  Advantage: It feels more like a luxury living space on wheels than just a big SUV.   Summary of Key Benefits  Safety & Driver Confidence  Full suite of active systems (adaptive cruise, lane assist, blind-spot assist, evasive support)  Comfort Enhancements  Warmth package creates cozy seats and armrests for all occupants  Daily Ease of Use  Less driver fatigue, better highway confidence, and improved urban handling[!@@Additional Info@@!]Navigation system: MB Navigation,Driver description: The 392 Safari 7The SoFlo Safari 7 takes the legendary Wrangler platform and transforms it into something no one else builds  a true seven-passenger, three-row powerhouse engineered without compromise. description: Introducing the 2021 Toyota Camry XSE, a captivating blend of style, performance, and cutting-edge technology. This exceptional sedan is the perfect companion for the discerning driver who seeks a sophisticated and dynamic driving experience.At the heart of this Camry XSE lies a powerful 2.5L I4 DOHC 16V engine, paired with an efficient 8-Speed Automatic transmission and Front-Wheel Drive. With an impressive 27 city/38 highway MPG, this Camry delivers exceptional fuel efficiency, allowing you to maximize your driving pleasure while minimizing your fuel costs.- ONE OWNER- LOCAL TRADE- GOOD MAINTENANCE HISTORY- CLEAN CARFAX- PANORAMIC GLASS ROOF- TWO-TONE EXTERIOR COLOR: Midnight black metallic roof, rear spoiler, and mirror housingsThe striking exterior of the Camry XSE is further enhanced by the panoramic glass roof, providing an open and airy cabin that floods the interior with natural light. The two-tone color scheme, with the midnight black metallic accents, adds a touch of sophistication and style that is sure to turn heads wherever you go.Step inside the Camry XSE and experience the epitome of modern luxury. The perforated leather seat trim, heated front seats, and power-adjustable driver's seat ensure unparalleled comfort and support, while the Panoramic Glass Roof creates an open and inviting atmosphere. The advanced infotainment system, featuring Apple CarPlay and Android Auto integration, seamlessly connects your smartphone to the vehicle, allowing you to stay connected and entertained on the go.Safety is of the utmost importance, and the Camry XSE delivers with a comprehensive suite of advanced safety features.
